text:
Market today: The mood is mixed, with a strong undercurrent of AI and cybersecurity concerns. Recent news about rogue AI cyber models and escalating threat levels suggests a potential pivot towards security-focused tech plays.

Your holdings: SOXL (-36.1%) and SPAL (-53.88%) are deep in the red. As leveraged ETFs, their decay and drawdowns are amplified, especially on margin. QQQI (-3.47%) is also marked for trim, with its stop close.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions, SOXL and SPAL, for further downside. Also, watch for strong cybersecurity plays emerging from the AI news.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage your leveraged positions and stay alert for cybersecurity opportunities.
plays: Review SOXL's -36.1% loss; consider trimming to reduce leveraged decay and margin exposure. Respect your default stop at 200.
SPAL is down -53.88%. Given its leveraged nature, reassess your stop at 21.38 to prevent further significant losses.
QQQI is a TRIM at -3.47%. Consider reducing the position if it approaches your stop at 52, especially with margin.
